name: zombie-run
description: The Last Braincell — webcam motion-controlled apocalypse survival game (React + Socket.IO).

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c green,cyan "PORT=4000 npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix sit-hack-frontend -- --host --port 5173 --strictPort"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix sit-hack-frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix sit-hack-frontend
